schemaVersion__doc: Increment when curse ids or perPick keys change structurally.
description__doc: Void trial per-floor curse pool. One pick per dungeon floor; stacks accumulate for the whole trial.
description: Void corruption curses — loaded into CONFIG.void.corruption.
tripletSize__doc: How many curse cards are offered each floor (player chooses exactly one).
curses__doc: Each curse: label + description for UI; perPick maps to VoidCorruption modifier keys.

hp_pct.label__doc: Display name on corruption pick cards and HUD.
hp_pct.label: Frailty
hp_pct.description__doc: Shown on pick card; HUD total uses perPick via corruptionStackSummary().
hp_pct.perPick__doc: maxHpMult is additive per stack: 2 picks → 1 + (−0.02 × 2) on void cap snapshot.
